props.topic: HUMANITARIANS AI · Uncertainty Principle Hyperbola with Claude

beats.narration_text: Annyeong. This is Kore, in for Humanitarians AI. One Claude prompt. A live interactive simulation of σ_x×σ_p ≥ ħ/2 log-log.

Here is why Uncertainty Principle Hyperbola with Claude belongs in your working knowledge. The systems, policies, and tools shaped by it affect decisions at your level — whether or not you understand the mechanism. Knowing the underlying logic gives you the frame; missing it means reasoning from output with no access to the inputs.
Quantum mechanics is full of non-obvious results. Today's: σ_x×σ_p ≥ ħ/2 log-log. Key checkable number: ratio 1.136. Let us build the demonstration.

props.prompt: Build me an interactive D3 simulation of σ_x×σ_p ≥ ħ/2 log-log. Use D3 version 7 from CDN. Single-file HTML, all physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Add at least one slider or control. Teardown palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. D3 version 7. All the physics runs in the browser. No server. No build step.
Here is the baseline — the simulation at rest. σ_x×σ_p ≥ ħ/2 log-log.
Now interact with the control — drag the slider, click the toggle. Watch the physics respond.
The simulation updates in real time. ratio 1.136. Exactly as the equations predict.
One prompt. A live quantum mechanics demonstration. σ_x×σ_p ≥ ħ/2 log-log. Bear reviews these in the morning and ships the ones that pass.
Your turn. Extend this vol1 uncertainty hyperbola simulation. Add a second control that changes [parameter]. Show how it affects the result.
